title: Marx self-study activities (procedural — missing framing)

activities.title: Key life events timeline

required_materials.specification: Table with life phases and blank response cells.

activities.learner_task: Complete the timeline table with four life phases and one idea per phase.
activities.failure_mode: If the learner stalls, offer a worked example for the first row.
activities.facilitator_moves: Circulate during minutes 5–15 and prompt learners who leave cells blank.

activities.title: Compare major works

required_materials.specification: Short paired excerpts from the Manifesto and Capital.

activities.learner_task: Fill the comparison table with purpose and key difference for each work.
activities.failure_mode: If comparison is superficial, ask for one concrete audience difference.
activities.facilitator_moves: Debrief in pairs then whole-group share.

delivery_notes: Self-directed page workflow run without activity_preamble or cognition cues.
